source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local event surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.9|seg.1.1.1.10|seg.1.1.1.11
distilled_thesis: The plea to bless the cup prepares outpouring by asking that what is held in fullness may now be rightly released.
